# KHUSHAANK GUPTA PORTFOLIO - LLM CONTEXT
Owner: Khushaank Gupta
Role: CA Aspirant & Finance Student (Delhi University)
Keywords: Strategy, Finance, Auditing, Tax, Commerce
Tech Stack: HTML, CSS, Vanilla JS, Supabase

## Content
- /index.html: Portfolio homepage, about, skills, projects.
- /blog.html: Financial insights and articles.
- /tools.html: SIP Calculator and financial tools.
- /viewer.html: Article reader.
